positive: A minimalist, highly stylized forest silhouette scene at twilight. The composition must feature clean, layered shapes of stylized trees (pine, birch, and abstract foliage) forming a perfect central cluster. The ground should be represented by smooth, stylized wave patterns, creating strong negative space contrast. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and matte black, achieving a high-contrast, distressed screen-print look. The lighting should be dramatic, suggesting a hidden, stylized full moon casting deep shadows. Vector art aesthetic combined with hyper-detailed textile print quality. Central composition, graphic design focus, scalable for apparel.
negative: artifacts, blur, noise, text, watermark, low resolution, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realistic photo, signature, gradient, logo, trademark
